Rub surface With soft, clean cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washThis pair of informal shoes from skechers is for the man of style. The grey patches on the suede black leather body, coupled with silver lace holes make this pair uber cool. The soft fabric shoe lining creates a comfortable environment for the feet and keeps them safe of shoe bites. The cushioned insole protects the feet from impact, while the shock absorbing lightweight midsole makes this pair appropriate for use on hard indoor surfaces. The high traction flexible outsole supports the natural body movement and walking posture. The outsole makes the shoe flexible, weather-resistant and easy to maintain through all seasons.
